column2: 3 of 4 uploaded; no viable 4th POI: shopping-dining candidates (Kefayat Market, Jawzjani/Balkh markets) had only crowded/gloomy/interior photos and text-only generation misrepresented the real building; Places coverage too sparse for other categories

coords (22.69056,92.23472) resolve to rural Kaptai lake area in Rangamati district, not an urban Karnaphuli centre; all Places probes (bazar/mosque/park/school) return POIs in Rangamati town several km away; zero walkable POIs available
